rulings.Case Title: BURKE HANSEN VS. JOSH HACHADOURIAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing Re Demurrer Of Cross-Defendants San Francisco Elks Lodge No. 3 And San Francisco Elks Building Association To Cross-Complaint Of Tcc Union Square Lp, Et Al.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 31, 2017 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTs SAN FRANCISCO ELKS LODGE NO. 3, SAN FRANCISCO ELKS LODGE BUILDING ASSOCIATION [Amended] Demurrer To Cross-Complaint Of TCC Union Square LP, Et Al. Continued to November 30, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative cross-complaint. Courtesy copies shall be delivered to department 501 no later than November 3, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court notes that courtesy copy of the motion papers have been delivered to department 501 at 1:30 p.m. on October 27, 2017. = (501/REQ) (late 3:10)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Striking Untimely Amended Complaint And Dimsissing Action For Failure To Timely Amend Complaint After Demurrer Sustained With Leave To Amend; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Request For Judicial Notice; Declaration Of Anthony D. Prince; Declaration Of James Sales; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 31, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT JAMES SALES' Motion For Order Striking Untimely Amended Complaint And Dimsissing Action For Failure To Timely Amend Complaint After Demurrer Sustained With Leave To Amend; DENIED. No proof of service for the Order Sustaining Demurrer with Leave to Amend on File. Moving party failed to provide sufficient notice of this motion per CCP 1005 and 1013. No courtesy copy of the moving papers provided to department 501. = (501/REQ) (late 3:11)

rulings.Case Title: 212-214 CALIFORNIA ST., LLC VS. CBD SOLUTIONS INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 31, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs CBD SOLUTIONS INC., CSBB, INC.'s AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege that (1) a 15 day written notice was provided to Defendant for the violation at issue in this action or (2) that a 15 day written notice has been previously provided for such violation, i.e. paragraphs 14.1, 14.2, 14.4, 16.1, 12, 8.1 pf the lease. = (501/REQ) (late)
